data.content:
The build confirms the issue. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the file, but **never adds it to the `Compile` item group**. SDK-style projects expand file globs at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the dynamically generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `<Compile>` (and `<FileWrites>` for clean support) inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and writes the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. Since SDK-style projects expand globs at evaluation time (before targets run), the generated file isn't picked up by the implicit glob.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `<Compile>` item group within the target, after writing it. I should also add it to `<FileWrites>` so the Clean target knows about it.

Let me fix this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis and fix:

**Root cause:** SDK-style projects expand implicit `<Compile>` globs at *evaluation time* (before targets run). The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the `.cs` file during *execution time*, so it's never seen by the compiler.

**Fix:** Added `<Compile Include="..."/>` and `<FileWrites Include="..."/>` inside the target's `<ItemGroup>` after the file is written. This explicitly tells MSBuild to include the generated file in compilation and to clean it up on `dotnet clean`.
